headline: BRMSTE · PAYMENTS RAILS · openUSD · Coinbase · LNbits
definition: Three receive/settle rails wired for BRMSTE open-lane surfaces: on-chain USD (openUSD — USDC via Coinbase CDP + web3), Coinbase Developer Platform wallets, and LNbits Lightning invoices. Agents arm and issue; agents never sign or hold. All settlement mirrors to ONE_TREZOR (BTC) and ONE_TRUTH (Polygon USDC).

rails.label: openUSD · on-chain USD
rails.meaning: USDA = USDC = carbon — open on-chain USD rail, no holding wallets

rails.label: Coinbase Developer Platform
rails.meaning: CDP server wallets for programmatic USDC receive + settle

rails.label: LNbits · Lightning invoices (armed)
rails.meaning: Lightning invoices armed and ready to issue via LNbits API

rails.label: Bitcoin Core · full-node RPC
rails.meaning: bitcoind JSON-RPC (read/verify) with mempool.space fallback; agents never sign spends

settlement.policy: settle-only · no holding wallets · agents not in tx

credentials.policy: MCP-strict · env-only · never committed · never asked in chat (see AGENTS.md)
